summary: Created calendly-setup.md reference doc with exact settings: 15min, max 2/day, weekdays 12-4pm ET, 4hr minimum notice, 2-week rolling window, 5min buffer. Includes custom questions (name, help needed, source). No code changes needed - webhook already reads ZO_HOTLINE_CALENDLY_LINK env var. V needs to create event type in Calendly UI and set the env var.
